channel.title: Xiaomi 13 Lite MIUI Updates Tracker by XiaomiFirmwareUpdater
channel.description: Your best website to track MIUI ROM releases!

image.title: Xiaomi 13 Lite MIUI Updates Tracker by XiaomiFirmwareUpdater

item.title: MIUI OS3.0.3.0.VLLRUXM Fastboot update for Xiaomi Civi 2 / 13 Lite Russia
item.description:
New Stable Fastboot update available!

Device: Xiaomi Civi 2 / 13 Lite Russia

Codename: ziyi

Version: OS3.0.3.0.VLLRUXM | 15.0

Size: 7.2 GB

MD5: 40eed76290051deb118db95ea8bae256

Changelog:
[System]
Updated the security patch to May 2026. Increased system security.

Download: Here
